title: calais nutans
intro: Calais nutans, also known as the nutted calamint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Calais nutans include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. Calais nutans can be prepared as a herbal tea by steeping the leaves in hot water or as a tincture by mixing the plant's extract with a carrier oil.
